title: Specific Subitem Notification
excerpt: I am running several boards for our APQP systems and they all have interconnectivity within the respective department boards. When our engineering team finishes their control plans/PFMEA, our quality team is to be notifi…

posts.author: jpdennie (Justin Dennie)
posts.cookedHtml:
I am running several boards for our APQP systems and they all have interconnectivity within the respective department boards. When our engineering team finishes their control plans/PFMEA, our quality team is to be notified so they can begin working. The control plan/PFEMA are individual subitems among several other subitems underneath the main line item, which is the part number, and I have no way to have those two specific subitems to notify our quality guys that control plan/PFMEA are complete.

TLDR; looking for a way to get a formula for ‘when subitem status is marked Done and subitem name is control plan or PFMEA, notify quality manager’

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @jpdennie

Looking at subitem automation capabilities, we can control the below conditions:

image732×426 22.5 KB

Could you add a status label to the subitems to signify control plan/PFEMA so it can read the label? The automations can’t read the item name and continue logic based on that field content.

Emma
teameasy@easy-mondays.com
